action.description:
Introduced by Senators Pfaff, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Roe, Subeck, Bare, Brown, Clancy, DeSanto, Emerson, Goodwin, Hong, Joers, Kirsch, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Tenorio, Udell, Vining and Anderson
